Name: GAME_SYSTEM_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines various parameters related to game systems and the player.

Fields.Name: Toughness Recovery Time
Fields.Description: The base recovery rate of toughness. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation ID: Left 90°
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use for the specified character rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation ID: Right 90°
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use for the specified character rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation ID: Left 180°
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use for the specified character rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation ID: Right 180°
Fields.Description: The animation ID to use for the specified character rotation.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation Start Angle: 90°
Fields.Description: The starting angle for the specified character rotation when it is applied. If the event starts at an angle smaller than this angle, a system turn will occur.

Fields.Name: Rotation Animation Start Angle: 180°
Fields.Description: The starting angle for the specified character rotation when it is applied. If the event starts at an angle smaller than this angle, a system turn will occur.

Fields.Name: Debt Item ID
Fields.Description: The item ID of the item that determines debt level. If less than 0, the debt will not be treasted as an invalid value.

Fields.Name: Damage Absorption upon Successful Guard Repel
Fields.Description: The damage absorption multiplier to use when a guard action successfully repels a weapon.

Fields.Name: NPC Conversation Animation: Start Angle
Fields.Description: The difference angle between the NPC and the player at which a NPC conversation animation will start to occur.

Fields.Name: NPC Conversation Animation: End Angle
Fields.Description: The difference angle between the NPC and the player at which a NPC conversation animation will stop occuring.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Turn
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID to turn an enemy corpse into a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Level-up
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the level-up menu at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Attribute Reallocation
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the attribute reallocation menu at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Hollowing Reset
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the hollowing reset menu at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Atonement
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the sin atonement menu at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Spirit Summon
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the spirit summon menu at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Bomb
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the bomb action at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Corpse: SpEffect ID - Block Invasion
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID given when using the block invasion action at a ritual corpse.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Level-up
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the level-up menu with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Attribute Reallocation
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the attribute reallocation menu with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Hollowing Reset
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the hollowing reset menu with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Atonement
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the sin atonement menu with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Spirit Summon
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the spirit summon menu with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Bomb
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the bomb action with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Sword: SpEffect ID - Block Invasion
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID for the block invasion action with a ritual sword.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Level-up
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the level-up action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Attribute Reallocation
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the attribute reallocation action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Hollowing Reset
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the hollowing reset action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Atonement
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the atonement action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Spirit Summon (No Slots)
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the spirit summon action with a ritual implement, with no available summon slots.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Spirit Summon (Outside Area)
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the spirit summon action with a ritual implement, when outside of the summoning area.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Spirit Summon (Area Clear)
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the spirit summon action with a ritual implement, when an area is cleared.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Bomb
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the bomb action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Ritual Action: Dialog ID - Block Invasion
Fields.Description: The dialogue ID to use when using the block invasion action with a ritual implement.

Fields.Name: Acquittal: Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID to hold whether a NPC has forgotten a player's sin.

Fields.Name: Atonement: Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID to hold whether the player has performed the atonement ritual.

Fields.Name: Notification SpEffect ID: Recovery when HP is below Max
Fields.Description: The notification SpEffect ID to use when the 'Recovery when HP is below maximum' SpEffect is completed.

Fields.Name: HP Flask Gain: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The absorption SFX ID to use when a HP flask is gained.

Fields.Name: MP Flask Gain: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The absorption SFX ID to use when a MP flask is gained.

Fields.Name: Notification SpEffect ID: Resurrection Activation
Fields.Description: The notification SpEffect ID to use when the 'Resurrection' SpEffect is completed. Mainly used for multiplayer sync.

Fields.Name: Host - Soul Absorption %: Intruder
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating an intruder as the host.

Fields.Name: Client - Soul Absorption %: Intruder
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating an intruder as a client.

Fields.Name: Host - Soul Absorption %: Enemy
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating an enemy as the host in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Client - Soul Absorption %: Enemy
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating an enemy as a client in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Host - Soul Absorption %: Boss
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating a boss as the host in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Client - Soul Absorption %: Boss
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier to use when defeating a boss as a client in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Gauge: Screen Offset
Fields.Description: The offset value in pixels for screen adjustments if the enemy HP gauge covers the entire screen (FullHD standard).

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for the emitted bullet from the enemy detection SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Maximum Detection Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of enemies that can be detected at once by the enemy detection SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Maximum Detection Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance at which enemies can be detected at once by the enemy detection SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Sign (Default)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Sign (Unaligned)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Sign (Sun Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Sign (Berserker Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Sign (Sinner Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Co-operator Ring (Intruder Hunter Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Orb (Unaligned)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Orb (Sun Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Orb (Berserker Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Orb (Sinner Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Sign (Unaligned)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Sign (Sun Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Sign (Berserker Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Sign (Sinner Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Ring (Sinner Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Ring (Boss: Forest Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - Intruder Ring (Map: Forest Covenant)
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Dead Again SpEffect: Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet ID to use for the Dead Again SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Dead Again SpEffect: Bullet Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for the emitted bullet from the Dead Again SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Dead Again SpEffect: Fade Out Time
Fields.Description: The fade out time for dead enemies affected by the Dead Again SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Network: Transition Ignore Time at Throw Start
Fields.Description: The time to ignore transitions at throw start due to network information.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penalty - LAN Disconnection
Fields.Description: The penalty points to apply for a client after LAN disconnection.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penalty - Profile Sign Out
Fields.Description: The penalty points to apply for a client after profile sign out.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penalty - Reboot
Fields.Description: The penalty points to apply for a client after reboot.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penalty - Suspend
Fields.Description: The penalty points to apply for a client after suspend.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penalty - Item Forgiveness Time
Fields.Description: The item forgiveness duration after incurring a multiplayer penalty.

Fields.Name: Network: Multiplayer Penality - Judgement Threshold
Fields.Description: The threshold at which a multiplayer penalty is incurred.

Fields.Name: Network: No Action Kick Duration
Fields.Description: The duration after which no actions have occured the player will be kicked from the multiplayer session. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection: Bullet ID - NPC Enemy
Fields.Description: The detection bullet ID to use for this specified type.

Fields.Name: Dead Again SpEffect: Active Target Search
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID applied during the active target search effect of Dead Again.

Fields.Name: Dead Again SpEffect: Active Target Search Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance for the active target search effect of Dead Again.

Fields.Name: Network: Low FPS Threshold
Fields.Description: The low FPS threshold at which a player is kicked from a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Network: Low FPS Duration
Fields.Description: The duration at which the low FPS threshold is met, after which a player will be kicked from a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Maximum Points for Single Intruder
Fields.Description: The maximum points for solo intruder entry. If this value is exceeded, the host is invaded by a solo player.

Fields.Name: NPC Conversation: Voice Timeout
Fields.Description: The timeout duration for voice playback during NPC conversations. If this timeout is reached, the next talk message occurs.

Fields.Name: Play Log Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which the play logging is sent to the server.

Fields.Name: Prism Stone: Maximum Particle Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of SFX that can originate from the Prism Stone item.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer: Matching Correction - Absolute Level
Fields.Description: The matching correction factor applied during multiplier, based on the specified factor.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer: Matching Correction - Relative Level
Fields.Description: The matching correction factor applied during multiplier, based on the specified factor.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer: Matching Correction - Weapon Reinforcement
Fields.Description: The matching correction factor applied during multiplier, based on the specified factor.

Fields.Name: Berserker Sign SpEffect: Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet ID to use when generating the SpEffect bullet at the sign position.

Fields.Name: Berserker Player Kill: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply when the berserker kills the host by themselves.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Relative Soul Level Coefficient (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The soul level coefficient to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Absolute Soul Level Coefficient (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The soul level coefficient to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Relative Soul Level Coefficient (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The soul level coefficient to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Absolute Soul Level Coefficient (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The soul level coefficient to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [0] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [1] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [2] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [3] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [4] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [5] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [6] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [7] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [8] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [9] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [10] (Friendly Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with friendly phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [0] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [1] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [2] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [3] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [4] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [5] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [6] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [7] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [8] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [9] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Level Sync: Maximum Weapon Reinforcement Coefficient [10] (Hostile Phantom)
Fields.Description: The maximum weapon reinforcement level factor to use when determining whether to apply level synchronization with hostile phantoms.

Fields.Name: Global Event Log Send Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which to send the global event log to the server.

Fields.Name: Intruder Entry Point: Addition Value (White Phantom)
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply for intruder entry for intruders of this type into the host's world.

Fields.Name: Intruder Entry Point: Addition Value (Red Phantom)
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply for intruder entry for intruders of this type into the host's world.

Fields.Name: Intruder Entry Point: Addition Value (Intruder)
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply for intruder entry for intruders of this type into the host's world.

Fields.Name: Intruder Entry Point: Addition Value (Visitor: Map Guardian)
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply for intruder entry for intruders of this type into the host's world.

Fields.Name: Intruder Entry Point: Addition Value (Visitor: Red Hunter)
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply for intruder entry for intruders of this type into the host's world.

Fields.Name: Corpse Redraw Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which a corpse will be marked to not be redrawn, even if it comes within draw distance again. In metres.

Fields.Name: Red Hunter: Soul Multiplier after Boss Entered
Fields.Description: The soul absorption multiplier applied to the Red Hunter when the host enters a boss arena through the fog gate. This multiplier is applied to the soul value of the Red Hunter next level difference.

Fields.Name: Stealth System: Player in Grass - Enemy Sight Reduction %
Fields.Description: The enemy visibility reduction rate to apply when the player is in grass but does not have SpEffect 150.

Fields.Name: Stealth System: Player not in Grass - Enemy Sight Reduction %
Fields.Description: The enemy visibility reduction rate to apply when the player is not in grass and has SpEffect 150.

Fields.Name: Stealth System: Player in Grass - Enemy Sight Reduction %
Fields.Description: The enemy visibility reduction rate to apply when the player is in grass and has SpEffect 150.

Fields.Name: Impact Damage Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of impact damage when it occurs. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Animation Playback Speed Ratio during Hit Stop
Fields.Description: The animation playback speed % during hit stop additive damage.

Fields.Name: Animation Playback Speed Change Time during Hit Shop
Fields.Description: The animation playback speed change time during hit stop additive damage (in frames, or 1/30 seconds)

Fields.Name: Animation Playback Speed Ratio on Hard Hit
Fields.Description: The animation playback speed ratio upon a hard hit (0 means complete stop).

Fields.Name: Cover Judgement Raycast Distance
Fields.Description: The raycast distance used for the wall check when determining which direction to face when covering.

Fields.Name: Stagger Count before Collapse
Fields.Description: The number of staggers allowed before collapsing.

Fields.Name: Stagger Count Reset Duration
Fields.Description: The duration to reset the stagger count. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Grab Interpolation Frame
Fields.Description: The frame at which a target is grabbed when an entity is attempting a grab.

Fields.Name: Death Effect Maximum Duration
Fields.Description: The maximum duration for the death effect. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Wall Bounce: Ceiling Judgement Angle
Fields.Description: During a wall bounce, the angle at which the surface will be judged as a ceiling. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Wall Bounce: Character Front
Fields.Description: During a wall bounce, the angle that is considered the 'front' of the character. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Wall Bounce: Floor Judgement Angle
Fields.Description: During a wall bounce, the angle at which the surface will be judged as a floor. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Maximum Threshold Correction Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum threshold correction distance when determining ricochet. In metres.

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Damage Attenuation %
Fields.Description: The damage attenuation multiplier to apply during a ricochet.

Fields.Name: 1: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Threshold
Fields.Description: The threshold at which to increase the visual screen effect for ACS overload.

Fields.Name: 1: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Strength
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply when this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: 1: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Decay
Fields.Description: The decay rate for the addition value after this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: 2: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Threshold
Fields.Description: The threshold at which to increase the visual screen effect for ACS overload.

Fields.Name: 2: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Strength
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply when this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: 2: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Decay
Fields.Description: The decay rate for the addition value after this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: 3: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Threshold
Fields.Description: The threshold at which to increase the visual screen effect for ACS overload.

Fields.Name: 3: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Strength
Fields.Description: The addition value to apply when this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: 3: ACS Overload - Screen Effect Decay
Fields.Description: The decay rate for the addition value after this specific screen effect threshold is reached.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: GParam Change Time
Fields.Description: The time until the screen effect changes after the ACS overload effect is applied. In seconds.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Display Strength
Fields.Description: The final display strength of the effect whilst under ACS overload effect.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Display Duration
Fields.Description: The final display duration of the effect whilst under ACS overload effect.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Noise Update %
Fields.Description: The noise reduction multiplier after the ACS overload effect occurs.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Menu Display Strength %
Fields.Description: The effect addition multiplier when applied from the menu.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Menu Display Duration
Fields.Description: The effect duration when applied from the menu. In seconds.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Fade Out Delay
Fields.Description: The delay until the fade-out for the ACS overload particles. In seconds.

Fields.Name: ACS Overload: Fade Out Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the fade-out for the ACS overload particles. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision: Allowable Speed
Fields.Description: The allowable speed at which to apply blow-off wall collision. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision: Allowable Horizontal Angle Difference
Fields.Description: The allowable horizontal angle difference at which to apply blow-off wall collision. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision: Allowable Vertical Angle Difference
Fields.Description: The allowable vertical angle difference at which to apply blow-off wall collision. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Wall Collision: Behavior ID (for Player)
Fields.Description: The behavior ID to apply upon a wall collision (for the player).

Fields.Name: Wall Collision: Behavior ID (for Enemy)
Fields.Description: The behavior ID to apply upon a wall collision (for an enemy).

Fields.Name: Fade Out Duration after Death
Fields.Description: The fade out duration for characters after death. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hacking: Allowable Radius
Fields.Description: The radius in which hacking can continue after starting. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hacking: Allowable Height
Fields.Description: The height in which hacking can continue after starting. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hacking: Lower Height Offset
Fields.Description: The height offset to apply to the allowable height from the bottom. In metres.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Allowable Distance
Fields.Description: The distance from the player entity that the camera is allowed to move to whilst in Photo Mode. In metres.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Radius
Fields.Description: The radius of the camera hitbox whilst in Photo Mode. In metres.

Fields.Name: Vibration ID on Part Switch (Small)
Fields.Description: The vibration ID for rumble when switching small parts.

Fields.Name: Vibration ID on Part Switch (Large)
Fields.Description: The vibration ID for rumble when switching large parts.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: The radius of each capsule used for the cartridge case. In metres.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Capsule Length
Fields.Description: The length of each capsule used for the cartridge case. In metres (Must be larger than radius).

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Friction Coefficient
Fields.Description: The coefficient used for the cartridge friction. Higher values means it is easier to stop.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Bounce Coefficient
Fields.Description: The coefficient used for the cartridge bounciness. Higher values means it will bounce more.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Effective Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum effective distance of the cartridge (from the player). In metres.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Hit Ragdolls
Fields.Description: If ON, the cartridges will hit character ragdolls.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Deceleration Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before the horizontal deceleration of the cartridge. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Deceleration Duration
Fields.Description: The duration from the start of the deceleration until it reaches the maximum deceleration rate. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Maximum Deceleration %
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal deceleration of the cartridge.

Fields.Name: Arena: Map Impact - Particle Cull Distance
Fields.Description: In an arena match, this determines the cull distance for SFX that impact the map.

Fields.Name: Arena: Friendly Impact - Particle Processing Time
Fields.Description: In an arena match, this determines if a SFX that impact a friendly character is culled. Based on the processing time for the particle.

Fields.Name: Havok: Garbage Collection Interval
Fields.Description: The garbage collection interval for Havok's memeroy fragmentation system. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Movement Scale
Fields.Description: The scale for input with regards to camera movement whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Rotation Scale
Fields.Description: The scale for input with regards to camera rotation whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Movement Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for input with regards to camera movement whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Rotation Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for input with regards to camera rotation whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Movement - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: The minimum camera movement speed when changed by options whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: Photo Mode: Camera Movement - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum camera movement speed when changed by options whilst in Photo Mode.

Fields.Name: OS Tuning: Reset Cost
Fields.Description: The reset cost for OS improvements (per level).
